expo.name: Continuum 2.0
expo.description: Your autonomous AI memory advisor. Continuum builds a multi-layered semantic profile of your life to provide high-context advice and 24/7 memory retrieval.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Continuum needs access to your microphone to enable hands-free AI voice interactions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Continuum uses on-device neural processing to transcribe your voice instantly and privately.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Continuum needs access to your photos to allow the AI to analyze your documents and images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Continuum needs access to your camera to capture images for real-time visual AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Continuum uses FaceID to securely unlock your stored credentials and memory vault.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Continuum uses your location to provide real-time weather, travel advice, and environmental context for your AI advisor.
